purpose: Exhaust every binary assignment of the 13 maximal connected disagreement components between the two sealed V40 fixed points, then execute complete paired-state descent and measure only after sealing.
engineering_inference_not_maria_conclusi: The complete connected-component cube and subsequent paired-state sweep preserve V40 byte-exactly. This is applied closure evidence that recombining already-sealed component blocks under the unchanged V3 order does not create a new path. It is not a failed prediction or theoretical limit; the next derivation must add a forced inter-component or whole-chain topology relation rather than another subset of the same component cube. Maria determines all conclusions and official status.
